name: Marvelous Mocha Brownies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. In a large bowl, stir cocoa, sugar, and flour together. Add shortening and beat until the mixture is creamy and smooth. Beat in eggs and instant coffee. Pour batter into a greased 8-inch square pan, spreading evenly to cover the pan completely. Bake at 325°F for 20 minutes or until the top is shiny. Test with a toothpick; the center should be firm and fudgy. Do not overbake. Cool on a wire rack.
Icing: Melt butter in a pan over medium heat, add coffee. Boil for 2 minutes, stirring frequently. Remove from heat and blend in milk and icing sugar. Beat until smooth. Let icing cool until thick enough to spread. Frost the brownies. Meanwhile, melt 2 squares semisweet chocolate (in microwave or on top of double boiler). Immediately pour melted chocolate into a ziploc bag with a small hole snipped from the corner. Squeeze over frosted brownies in a crisscross pattern. With a blunt knife, swirl chocolate and icing together to create a marbled effect. Cut into bars when the icing has set.
